title: JustBetterVanilla
description: Fabric 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.20.6, 1.21-1.21.1 | Best client-side modpack with mods that optimize and complement the game!
body:
**This modpack optimize and improves your minecraft**

Join my [Discord :3]([https://discord.gg/ufDjUfNh](https://discord.gg/eMHPhhuhjV)) for information and more modpacks.



**Optimization**

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c1cda47f0fbee99979e40d8840a5f8af27fcf32.png)

Modpack adds mods to optimize the game, like Debugify, Dynamic FPS, Enhanced Block Entities, EntityCulling, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, Indium, Lithium, Sodium and Sodium Extra.

**UI**

  There is also mods, like Advancement Plaques, AmbientSounds, AppleSkin, Better Statistics Screen, BetterF3, Blur+, Chat Heads, Cherished Worlds, Eating Animation, Falling Leaves, Highlighter, Item Borders, Jade, Journeymap, Legendary Tooltips, Mouse Tweaks, Presence Footsteps, Shulker Box Tooltip, Sound Physics Remastered, Visuality and WI Zoom that will improve and change the game.
